text.title: Twitter X Monetization Thread To Product Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥3 audience-signal threads on file AND paid product / pre-order URL ready?

branch.question: Is email-gate offer derivative (PDF/template/kit) AND welcome sequence ≥5 emails?

branch.conclusion: Ship funnel spec: 7-tweet thread → email-gate → 5-email sequence → paid product.
Pause ship; create derivative gate asset + draft 5-email sequence first.
Skip this methodology. Audience signal + paid endpoint are both prerequisites.

text.example: signal=3 threads @ 12k/15k/22k impressions product=pre-order/$49 gate=10-template-pdf sequence=5 → ship funnel per r2.
